mapper.select: select product.id as product_id, product.name as product_name, product.number as product_number, product.is_deleted as product_is_deleted, product.register_date_time as product_register_date_time, product.update_date_time as product_update_date_time, supplier.id as supplier_id, supplier.name as supplier_name, supplier.is_deleted as supplier_is_deleted, supplier.register_date_time as supplier_register_date_time, supplier.update_date_time as supplier_update_date_time from m_product as product left join m_supplier as supplier on product.supplier_id = supplier.id where product.id = #{productId} and product.is_deleted != 1
